login.copy: Explore from the capital, gather resources, claim land, and grow a settlement outward on one shared map.
login.phantomRequiredBody: Install or enable Phantom to play. Spectate remains available without a wallet.
login.capitalText: Banking, appearance, guide, and reward systems are moving into world buildings and NPCs instead of permanent HUD menus.

toast.tutorialSkipped: Tutorial skipped. Capital NPCs will host deeper guidance later.
toast.tutorialReset: Tutorial reset. It will start when you enter as a player.
toast.buildGuideDone: Build cards explain cost, footprint, and construction time.
toast.treeChoppedNext: Tree chopped. Next try Mine (3) on stone.
toast.stoneMinedNext: Stone mined. Next select Capture (4) to expand connected territory.
toast.landCapturedNext: Land captured. Build next to raise limits and make the camp useful.
toast.notImage: That is not an image file.
toast.portraitLoadFailed: Portrait could not be loaded. Try another image.
toast.tooFarWalk: That point is too far to walk from here. Try moving in smaller steps or use a discovered travel point.
toast.spectatorReadonly: Spectator mode is read-only. Connect Phantom to claim, craft, build, trade, or collect. Spectators are visible as ghosts but cannot pick up coins.
toast.wonderAiBusy: World Wonder AI is already generating. The foundation will start after the plan is ready.
toast.wonderPlacementBusy: World Wonder placement is already running. Wait for the current request.
toast.wonderAlreadyFounding: Already founding that Wonder. Wait for the server response.
toast.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Your flag is ready.
toast.lowEnergy: Low energy — keep moving, then rest to refill.
toast.outOfEnergy: Out of energy. Roads and World Wonder districts are free to travel.
toast.adminOnly: Admin tools are only available to the world admin.
toast.woodToolSelected: Wood tool selected — trees are highlighted.
toast.stoneToolSelected: Stone tool selected — rocks are highlighted.
toast.captureSelected: Capture selected — click any free non-capital tile. Each tile costs stone.
toast.swordSelected: Sword selected — click a Keep, building, or nearby settler.
toast.chooseCapturedTile: Choose one of your empty captured tiles to build.
toast.useStonePick: Use the stone pick for rocks.
toast.useWoodAxe: Use the wood axe for trees.
toast.swordTargets: Sword targets Keeps, buildings, and settlers.

guide.emptySection: No cards in this section yet.

chop.title: Step 1: Axe
chop.text: Select the axe and click a tree. Wood drops as pickups on the map.

mine.title: Step 2: Pickaxe
mine.text: Select the pickaxe and click stone. The cursor tells you what can be worked.

claim.title: Step 3: Capture
claim.text: Select capture, stand on any open tile outside the capital, and claim it.

build.title: Step 4: Build
build.text: Select the hammer, click an empty captured tile, then choose a building in the right panel.

walkthrough.note: Basics stay here while you play. Skip anytime.

update.title: Update ready
update.reason: A new game build is ready. Refresh when convenient.

axe.label: Axe
axe.help: Axe cursor: click trees to chop wood.

pickaxe.label: Pickaxe
pickaxe.help: Pickaxe cursor: click rocks to mine stone.

hammer.label: Hammer
hammer.help: Hammer cursor: click a captured tile, then choose a building in the right panel.

shovel.label: Shovel
shovel.help: Shovel cursor: click one of your buildings to demolish it.

capture.label: Capture
capture.help: Capture cursor: click any free non-capital tile to claim it.

sword.label: Sword
sword.help: Sword cursor: attack Keeps, buildings, or nearby settlers.

progress.title: Progress
progress.text: Identity, guide cards, skills, and economy status.

advanced.title: Advanced tools
advanced.text: Useful, but not part of the moment-to-moment movement loop.

system.title: System
system.text: Visuals, sound, help, and session controls.

settings.label: Settings
settings.text: Camera, UI scale, sound, and tutorial reset.

desc.tree: A harvestable tree. Select the axe from the bottom toolbelt if you want to chop it.
desc.rock: A harvestable rock. Select the pickaxe from the bottom toolbelt if you want to mine it.
desc.food: A crop patch grown by a nearby farm. Food restores health over time and can be harvested when you stand beside it.
desc.trade: A public exchange point. In the capital this becomes the natural place for bank, deposit, withdrawal, and trade actions.
desc.npcBase: {role} crossing the frontier between the capital and player settlements.
desc.npcDanger: If attacked, they fight back for about {attack} health.
desc.buildTile: An empty captured tile. Choose the building you want here; construction starts immediately and completes over time.
desc.keep: A shared raid target. Coordinate in chat, walk there together, and attack before the keep regenerates too much health.
desc.shared: A place shared in chat. Open it here, then walk toward it when your group is ready.
desc.tile: Open ground. With no tool selected, clicking walkable land moves your character.
desc.npcResource: They gathered about {amount} {resource} from nearby frontier work.

buildChoices.name: House
buildChoices.text: Expands your settlement and supports future services.

buildChoices.name: Lumber Camp
buildChoices.text: Improves wood gathering and frontier growth.

buildChoices.name: Mine
buildChoices.text: Improves stone gathering and building flow.

buildChoices.name: Farm
buildChoices.text: Grows crops; food restores health over time.

npc.watchingRoad: I am watching the road between the capital and the settlements.
npc.carryingResource: I am carrying {amount} {resource} from the frontier.
npc.carryingCoins: I have {coins} coins for the road.
npc.trader: {name}: Donate supplies to earn trust with the Empire, or leave me to gather resources.{carrying}
npc.warrior: {name}: Keep your blade sheathed unless you want the Empire to remember it.{carrying}
npc.traveler: {name}: Roads, camps, and Wonders draw travelers like me.{carrying}

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Audio, visuals, guide, and session controls live here. Press Esc again to close.
settings.audioNote: Browsers often require a click before music can start. Use Start music after entering the world.
settings.interfaceNote: HUD, minimap, toolbelt, tooltips, and panels.
settings.controlsNote: Use 1–6 for axe, pickaxe, hammer, shovel, capture, and sword. Esc opens this menu.

help.title: How to play
help.intro: Use the bottom bar like a city-builder hotbar: craft, gather with separate tools, capture, build, deploy crafted tools, and interact. Movement works in every action mode by clicking the world or using WASD, and each tile costs a tiny bit of energy that refills quickly. Tutorial objectives live in Quests.
help.hotkeys: craft · wood · stone · capture · build · deploy · use/scroll

gather.title: Gather
gather.text: Select Wood or Stone, then click the matching highlighted resource. Drops become pickups on the ground instead of teleporting into your bag.

build.title: Build
build.text: Press 5, scroll the row, read exact cost/purpose, then click a valid owned pad.

economy.title: Coin Economy Goal
economy.text: Claim more territory to increase coin opportunities, tax visitors on your land, and defend your Coin Mint.

redeem.title: Redeem
redeem.text: Your Phantom wallet is the account and payout wallet.

modeChoices.name: District / many tiles
modeChoices.text: Multiple towers, halls, gardens, pylons, and accents spread across the plaza.

modeChoices.name: Big single landmark
modeChoices.text: One dominant monument centered on the plaza with support props.

ribbon.wonderPlaceholder: Describe the landmark: school, dish, observatory, market...
ribbon.foundValidTile: click a valid tile to found.
ribbon.adminHint: Click Admin, choose demolish or spawn, then click the map. Small minimap ignores far outlier Keeps; expanded World Map still shows everything.
ribbon.axeTipBody: Highlight trees and click one to chop. Lumber Camps create more trees.
ribbon.pickaxeTipBody: Highlight rocks and click one to mine. Quarries expose fresh stone.
ribbon.useAria: Use — interact with buildings and supplies
ribbon.useTipBody: Click nearby buildings, consume usable items, or interact with trade posts.
ribbon.craftTipBody: Craft gear, elixirs, and deployable tools.
ribbon.deployTipBody: Select crafted deployables, then click a valid tile.
ribbon.homeAria: Home base — return to your settlement flag
ribbon.homeTipBody: Cast briefly, then return to your settlement flag. Moving cancels the cast.
ribbon.wonderTravelTip: Travel to an explored/unlocked Wonder. Wonder taxes can be balanced server-side later.
ribbon.returnScrollAria: Return Scroll — infinite teleport to your flag after casting
ribbon.returnScrollTip: Infinite use. Stand still through the cast to return to your flag.

factions.tileBonus: Faction standing adds {bonus} trusted frontier tiles.
